brandLine: Learn AI. Build proof. Grow your value.
status: proposed until verified — no official Senioto.net CSS or screenshots found in workspace; verify against senioto.net before locking

fonts.headline: Inter Bold / Montserrat Bold (fallback: Arial Bold, DejaVu Sans Bold)
fonts.code: JetBrains Mono (fallback: Consolas, DejaVu Sans Mono)
fonts.note: Use system-safe fallbacks in automated renders; use Inter/Montserrat in CapCut and Canva.

captionStyle.mode: keyword overlays for long-form, full captions for Shorts
captionStyle.position: lower third for long-form, bottom safe zone for Shorts
captionStyle.animation: pop-in scale 95%->100%, 150ms, synced to VO keyword

lowerThirdStyle.secondaryText: Senioto — Learn AI. Build proof. Grow your value.
lowerThirdStyle.bar: electric blue #2563EB 6px left rule, deep navy panel, soft white text
lowerThirdStyle.animation: slide in from left 250ms, hold 4s, slide out
lowerThirdStyle.usage: first talking-head appearance and after each chapter card

titleCardStyle.background: deep navy #07111F with subtle grid pattern and soft radial glow
titleCardStyle.title: soft white #F8FAFC, bold, max 4 words
titleCardStyle.underline: cyan teal #14B8A6 accent line animating left to right

motionBackgroundStyle.primary: senioto_framework_map — animated three-node flow: LEARN -> BUILD -> GROW with glowing accent lines
motionBackgroundStyle.secondary: enterprise_grid_pulse — dark grid, slow teal pulse
motionBackgroundStyle.workflow: brief_to_zip_flow_map — Brief -> Agent -> HTML -> QA -> ZIP node map
motionBackgroundStyle.rules: slow movement only, never distracts from voice, 10-20% opacity behind text

buttonCtaStyle.usage: subscribe end card and thumbnail CTA chip

chapterCardStyle.accent: electric blue number, teal underline sweep

thumbnailStyle.anatomy: 3-line text stack left, highlight bar on line 2, amber arrow accent, subject right, dark background with ghosted UI
thumbnailStyle.background: #07111F with faint workflow/code ghosted at 15% opacity
thumbnailStyle.line2: electric blue #2563EB solid highlight bar, white bold text
thumbnailStyle.accent: warm amber curved arrow pointing at line 2
thumbnailStyle.subject: talking head chest-up right third (or Brief-to-ZIP workflow art until footage exists)
thumbnailStyle.brandMark: Senioto mark bottom-left with soft blue glow
